tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service

payload.description: SBS project on Webster Avenue in the Bronx. Fourth Community Advisory Committee meeting held November 29, 2012. Conceptual design presented for Bx41 SBS with offset bus lane.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue, Bronx

payload.description: Webster Avenue corridor in the Bronx, subject of the Webster Avenue SBS project. Key intersections include Cross Bronx Expressway, East Tremont Avenue, East Fordham Road, and East Gun Hill Road.

tool_args.label: Bx41 SBS

payload.description: Proposed SBS service on Webster Avenue. Conceptual design presented at CAC Meeting #4 featuring offset bus lane.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Local

payload.description: Bx41 local service on Webster Avenue. Will continue to have articulated buses.

issues: route target_record_id route_webster-ave-sbs implies service_variant "sbs" but payload implies "local"; submit a separate route record or remove the contradictory variant instead of merging service variants

tool_args.label: Bx55 Limited

payload.description: Bx55 Limited will be renamed the Bx15 Limited and provide limited-stop service between The Hub and Fordham Plaza along Third Avenue and local service between West Harlem and The Hub.

tool_args.label: Bx15 Limited

payload.description: Bx15 Limited will provide limited-stop service between The Hub and Fordham Plaza along Third Avenue and local service between West Harlem and The Hub. Renamed from Bx55 Limited.

tool_args.label: Bx15 Local

payload.description: Bx15 Local will provide all-stop service between The Hub and Fordham Plaza along Third Avenue.

tool_args.label: Bx34

payload.description: Bx34 serves a population with limited access to transit. Proposed improvements could include rerouting to utilize bus lanes on Webster Avenue instead of Bainbridge and Valentine Avenues. Possible one-way conversion of East 197th and East 198th Streets.

tool_args.label: Bx36

payload.description: Bx36 connects at East 180th Street and East Tremont Avenue. Mentioned in context of Bx41 SBS stop location discussion.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Local

payload.description: Bx41 local service on Webster Avenue. Will continue to have articulated buses.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lane on Webster Avenue

payload.description: Conceptual design for Bx41 SBS featured a typical SBS station location with an offset bus lane

tool_args.label: Dedicated bus signal at E 176th St

payload.description: Dedicated bus signal proposed for southbound buses at E 176th St, allowing bus to move through intersection a few seconds ahead of regular vehicular traffic to avoid congestion near Cross Bronx Expressway
payload.location_text: southbound E 176th St near Cross Bronx Expressway, Bronx

normalized_location.raw_text: southbound E 176th St near Cross Bronx Expressway, Bronx

tool_args.label: Signal optimization at Webster Ave and E Gun Hill Rd

payload.description: Signal optimization to make intersection of Webster Avenue and East Gun Hill Road function more efficiently. No dedicated bus lane on East Gun Hill Road.
payload.location_text: Webster Avenue and East Gun Hill Road, Bronx

normalized_location.raw_text: Webster Avenue and East Gun Hill Road, Bronx

tool_args.label: Left turn ban from East Fordham Road onto Webster Avenue

payload.description: Banning left turns from East Fordham Road onto Webster Avenue to improve intersection efficiency by eliminating one signal phase and giving more signal time to Webster Avenue. Westbound left turns rerouted via Washington Avenue and East 189th Street; eastbound via East 188th Street.
payload.location_text: East Fordham Road and Webster Avenue, Bronx

normalized_location.raw_text: East Fordham Road and Webster Avenue, Bronx

tool_args.label: Conversion of Ittner Place to one-way traffic

payload.description: Conversion of Ittner Place to one-way traffic as a traffic improvement idea

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS CAC Meeting #4

payload.event_name: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting #4
payload.description: Fourth Community Advisory Committee meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project. Held at Garden Terrace Room Foyer, Abigail Kirsch, The New York Botanical Garden, 2900 Southern Boulevard, Bronx, NY.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS Public Open House

payload.description: Public Open House in early January 2013 as next step for the Webster Avenue SBS project

tool_args.label: Fewer than 300 Bx55 riders continue north of E Fordham Rd

payload.claim_text: The number of current Third Avenue bus riders who continue north of East Fordham Road on the Bx55 is not a large number, fewer than 300 riders a day.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Moving Bx41 SBS stop to E 183rd St creates more even spacing

payload.claim_text: Moving the stop to East 183rd Street would create more even spacing between stops and create a more direct walking route to St. Barnabas Hospital.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Bx34 has good ridership

payload.claim_text: For a route of its length and purpose, the Bx34 has good ridership numbers.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Vandalism of SBS fare collection machines less than expected since Bx12 SBS

payload.claim_text: There has been some, but vandalism was less than expected since off-board fare collection machines were implemented on the Bx12 SBS.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Proposed SBS service between Webster Avenue and LaGuardia Airport

payload.claim_text: Proposed SBS service between Webster Avenue and LaGuardia Airport, a recommendation from the LaGuardia Alternatives Analysis Study. Service from Fordham Plaza would continue south of The Hub to East 138th Street.

tool_args.label: Moving Bx41 SBS stop would create two-fare situation for Bx36

payload.claim_text: Moving the stop to East 183rd Street would create a two-fare situation for many riders who want to connect to the Bx36 to St. Barnabas Hospital. The walk from Webster Avenue would be difficult for seniors.
